title: Grippers
description: A horror-comedy mod featuring a custom dimension, cryptic secrets, explore carefully, there's more going on than it seems.
body:
# 🦶 Grippers

**Fabric · Minecraft 1.21.1 · Beta**

```
Gripp first or be gripped
```


Something is wrong with your world and nobody's talking about it. Dig deep enough, explore far enough, and you'll start finding things that don't belong, messages left behind by people who aren't people anymore.

There's a way through. You'll know it when you see it. What's on the other side isn't for the faint of heart.

---

## What is this

Grippers is a horror-comedy mod built around exploration, discovery, and 3 bossfights that will make you want to uhhh, idk tbh. I'm not going to spoil the details here half the fun is figuring out what's going on.

What I will say:

- There is a **custom dimension**. It is grippy.
- There are 3 **bosses**. They are grippy.
- There are **things living there** that shouldn't be there.
- There are items, lore, and secrets scattered everywhere. Explore. Pay attention.
- Killing the bosses will not be the end. Try bringing him back. 

~~There's no going back...~~

---

## Heads up

- ⚠️ **Shaders are not optimized for the custom dimension** - they may cause visual issues or performance drops. The mod will handle this for you, but just know going in.
- 🧪 This is an **beta release**. The core content is fully playable but I have a ton of ideas still in the works. More is coming soon.
- 🐛 Bug reports and feedback are appreciated - this is just the beginning.

**Requires:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) · [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

---
